operations.text:
Pinindot mo 'yung XE app kanina. ₱59.88 ulit. Tapos may lumitaw na weather alert sa Facebook mo: another LPA papasok sa PAR this weekend.

Hindi pa nag-start ang typhoon season. Nakasara na 31 ports nung January dahil kay Storm Ada. 832,986 tao apektado sa unang bagyo pa lang ng taon. Sa atin, ibig sabihin nyan: late deliveries, nasirang stock, customers na nawawala sa radar for a week.

Tapos meron 'yung peso. Yung supplier mo na sa Hong Kong nag-bi-bill, sa Korea nag-bi-bill, kahit sa Lazada Mall… invisibly, sa dollar pa rin lahat 'yan. Bawat ₱59.88 = ₱3 na binigay mo libre. Multiply mo per order. Walang fight.

PCCI nag-warn na noong March: "MSMEs will bear the brunt." Yan ang official position ng business chamber ng buong bansa. Hindi yan nag-eexaggerate.

May 9, 2026. PTTC Pasay. 9 AM–6 PM. BUSINESS UNLOCKED. 13 PH operators na nag-build through 2020, 2022, at ngayon na ito. Ito ang araw mo para gumawa, hindi makinig.

Aalis ka with: Crisis-Proof Blueprint na specific sa business mo, 2 new revenue streams na mapped live, 7-day execution plan, AI + content plan na pwede mong patakbuhin by Monday, at 3 owner-friends. Worth ₱27,500.

"Eh mahal pa 'yung biyahe ko papuntang Pasay kaysa sa ticket." Sige. Kung sa unang oras wala kang makuhang plano na sulit sa biyahe at ticket combined, refund agad. Walang sulit sa unang oras? Refund agad.

👉 https://www.exponential-university.live/the-new-business-normal

Click link. Lock seat.

You already survived 2020. This is how you survive 2026.

#NewBusinessNormal #SmallBusinessPH #CrisisProof #PhilippineSMEs

Pull-to-refresh. Wala pa rin. Pull-to-refresh ulit. Wala pa rin. Tapos ang sabi mo sa sarili mo: "5 minutes lang, baka may lumabas."

Pamilyar?

Sabi ng TikTok Shop, ₱3-5 dagdag fee per order since December. Sa ibabaw nun, 2.24% transaction fee. Sa ibabaw nun, 5-5.5% shipping fee. Sa ₱200 na order mo, mahigit 10% lumalabas before pa makarating sa'yo 'yung pera. At ito 'yung "payapa" mong platform… yung dapat mas mababa ang fees kaysa sa nakasanayan mong Shopee.

Tapos consumer side, inflation 4.1%, 20-month high. Rice flipped from -3.4% to +3.6% in one month. Yung mga regular customers mong nag-or-order ng birthday gifts, school supplies, snack packs… sila yung unang nagba-bawas. Hindi ka unfair-targeted. Ginusto ka lang ng 2026.

Pero may mga sellers na hindi nag-ti-trip sa zero-order days. Hindi dahil mas magaling sila. May system lang sila na hindi naka-paghihintay sa pull-to-refresh.

May 9, 2026. PTTC Pasay. BUSINESS UNLOCKED. 1 day. 4 pillars. Workbook. 13 PH operators na lumampas na sa "platform-only" stage.

Aalis ka with: Crisis-Proof Blueprint sa store mo, 2 off-platform revenue streams, 7-day execution plan, AI + content plan, 3 connections. Worth ₱27,500.

"Lahat ng screenshot, pwedeng i-photoshop." Verify mo bago ka bumili. Drop a comment, papadala namin sa'yo 'yung dashboard at speaker list.

Walang sulit sa unang oras? Refund agad.

👉 https://www.exponential-university.live/the-new-business-normal

Click the link. Lock it in.

Build a crisis-proof business before it's too late.

#NewBusinessNormal #TikTokShopPH #SmallBusinessPH #MSMEPH

Last Tuesday, kliyente mo nag-text: "Pre, hindi na natin kailangan ng deck nyo this month. Ginawa ko na sa Claude. Ayos na."

Hindi pa naman ganap na "tanggal ka." Pero pakiramdam parang ganun. Yung 4-hour discovery session, yung 6-hour design, yung 2-hour revisions… 20 minutes lang sa isang chat window.

World Bank sabi: 12.7M Pinoy jobs ang AI-exposed. 35-37% ng PH workforce. Highest sa buong ASEAN. Hindi 'to "future of work" article. Ito ang Tuesday afternoon mo.

Sabay-sabay nyan, peso ₱59.88. Yung Adobe, Figma, Notion, Loom subscriptions mo: bawat 1st of the month, ₱1,500-2,000 na dagdag tax sa'yo, dahil lang sa exchange rate.

Pero hindi ito game over. May 13 PH agency owners, freelancers, at consultants na nag-figure out ng magagamit nilang AI as their second pair of hands, hindi as their replacement. Sila ang nag-double down sa relationships, judgment, taste, at execution speed na hindi pwedeng i-prompt.

May 9, 2026. PTTC Pasay. BUSINESS UNLOCKED. 1 day, 4 pillars, isang execution room. Hindi keynote. Workbook.

Aalis ka with: Agency Crisis-Proof Blueprint, 2 revenue streams na hindi pwedeng i-AI replace, 7-day execution plan, AI + content plan na nag-aamplify hindi nag-rereplace sa'yo, at 3 agency owner connections. Worth ₱27,500.

"Babayaran ko lang yung Lambo ng speaker." Walang Lambo dito. ExpoU + Gencys ang nag-host. Makikita mo 'yung mga tao bago ka pa magbayad.

Walang sulit sa unang oras? Refund agad.

Click the link. Lock it in.

The new normal won't build itself.
